sys_security_acl.description: Allow delete for records in x_1909471_inspec_0_order, for users with role x_1909471_inspec_0.user, and if the ACL condition (assigned_toDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^EQ) evaluates to true.

sys_update_version.name: sys_security_acl_637936d793973a100cbd35befaba1076
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>false</advanced><applies_to/><condition table="x_1909471_inspec_0_order">assigned_toDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^EQ<item endquery="false" field="assigned_to" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="DYNAMIC" or="false" value="90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></condition><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Allow delete for records in x_1909471_inspec_0_order, for users with role x_1909471_inspec_0.user, and if the ACL condition (assigned_toDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^EQ) evaluates to true.</description><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>x_1909471_inspec_0_order</name><operation display_value="delete">delete</operation><script/><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-03 22:16:27</sys_created_on><sys_id>637936d793973a100cbd35befaba1076</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_1909471_inspec_0_order</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Inspect 2026" source="x_1909471_inspec_0">2f3eba82935fba100cbd35befaba10fe</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Inspect 2026">2f3eba82935fba100cbd35befaba10fe</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_637936d793973a100cbd35befaba1076</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-03 22:34:40</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>
